subject: [COMMON] Fix arithmetic loop bashisms
commit_message:
[COMMON] Fix arithmetic loop bashisms

pointed out by checkbashisms.

Issue-ID: OOM-2643
Signed-off-by: Guillaume Lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: I85fd7d9beca75dc729de247fa67a20b801748c19

Patch Set 14:

> Patch Set 13: Code-Review-1
> 
> all helm deployments are failing now

Let's rebase (+ add a semicolon probably useless) to see if it behaves better.

If not and except if you tell me that the command GNU seq is not available in the path
(what happens in some BSD systems),
I will be pretty convinced that the problem is elsewhere...

~$ APPC_REPLICAS=5
~$ for ((i=1;i<${APPC_REPLICAS};i++));do echo $i;done
1
2
3
4
~$ for i in $(seq 1 $((${APPC_REPLICAS}-1)));do echo $i;done
1
2
3
4
~$ n=5
~$ for (( i = 0; i < n; i++ )); do echo $i;done
0
1
2
3
4
~$ for i in $(seq 0 $(($n-1))); do echo $i;done
0
1
2
3
4
~$ for (( i = n-1; i >= 0; i-- )); do echo $i;done
4
3
2
1
0
~$ for i in $(seq $(($n-1)) -1 0); do echo $i;done
4
3
2
1
0
